Class IuLogHandler

java.lang.Object
java.util.logging.Handler
iu.logging.internal.IuLogHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class IuLogHandler extends Handler implements AutoCloseable
Efficiently handles writing log output for IU JEE application components.

    • IuLogHandler

      public IuLogHandler()
      Constructor

  • Method Details

    • resolvePath

      static Path resolvePath(Path path, String... name)
      Resolves a path relative to a given root, with characters that could potentially corrupt file names (: and /) stripped out.
      Parameters:
      path - root path
      name - one or more path entries
      Returns:
      relative path

    • subscribe

      public edu.iu.IuAsynchronousSubscription<IuLogEvent> subscribe()
      Subscribes to log events.
      Returns:
      IuAsynchronousSubscription of IuLogEvent

    • consoleTask

      void consoleTask(Level level)
      Subscribes to log messages, and writes each to System.out.
      Parameters:
      level - Maximum log level to print

    • fileTask

      void fileTask(Path logPath)
      Subscribes to log messages, and writes each to log files.
      Parameters:
      logPath - root filesystem for log file output

    • flushFiles

      void flushFiles()
      Synchronously flushes all file publisher buffers and related log files.

    • purgeTask

      void purgeTask()
      Repeatedly invokes purge in a loop as long as this instance is open.

    • purge

      void purge()
      Purges log events from the queue.

      Executes continuously in the background to prune older and excessive log events.

    • publish

      public void publish(LogRecord record)
      Specified by:
      publish in class Handler
